title: kalabotis pallens
intro: Kalabotis pallens, commonly known as Pale Kalabotis, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Kalabotis pallens include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which exhibit therapeutic actions such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
side_effects: Kalabotis pallens can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems due to the release of volatile oils. Ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as liver and kidney damage in severe cases. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils can also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue. Improper use of Kalabotis pallens can exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as asthma and other respiratory issues.
